project.name: spring-rest-sakila
project.description: A Spring Boot REST API service that provides CRUD operations on the MySQL Sakila sample database, which models a DVD rental store. The service exposes endpoints for managing actors, customers, films, payments, rentals, staffs, stores, and reporting data. It serves as a sample project demonstrating best practices for building REST APIs with Spring Boot, including support for complex queries and comprehensive API documentation.
project.architecture_summary: The codebase is organized as a layered monolithic Spring Boot application with clear separation of concerns. It uses Spring Data JPA for data access, MapStruct for entity-to-DTO mapping, and QueryDSL for complex queries. The architecture includes DTOs for API contracts, domain entities with embeddable value objects (FullName), mappers for transformation, and utility classes for constants and common definitions (error codes, categories, ratings, languages, HAL relations). Spring HATEOAS is integrated for hypermedia support, and Spring REST Docs with Asciidoctor is used for API documentation generation.

classes.description: An immutable enum-like constant class representing product or entity categories, with getter access and required constructor initialization.
An immutable enum-like constant class representing countries, providing utilities to replace country identifiers with country names in strings.

methods.description: Replaces the last occurrence of a country ID in the input string with its corresponding country name.

notable_aspects: Contains string replacement logic with cyclomatic complexity ~2, indicating conditional branching for country ID matching

classes.description: An immutable enum-like constant class representing system error codes, with getter access and required constructor initialization.
An immutable enum-like constant class representing error severity levels, with getter access and required constructor initialization.
An immutable enum-like class representing film ratings with getter access to its properties.
A utility class defining HAL (Hypertext Application Language) relation constants with generated field name accessors.
An immutable enum-like class representing languages with getter access to its properties.
Constant holder for film category types used throughout the application.
A constant class that uses Lombok annotations to generate getter methods and a constructor requiring all final fields; likely defines special feature constants or enumerations for the application.
A Data Transfer Object that converts ErrorCode instances into standardized ProblemDetail error responses for API clients.
A simple Data Transfer Object representing a person's full name, equipped with standard getter/setter and builder pattern support.
An interface or utility class that provides validation logic to check whether all fields in an object are null.
A generic interface defining a contract for objects that can update an entity of type E with their state.
A value object representing a person's full name, designed as an embeddable JPA entity component that can be reused across multiple domain entities.
A MapStruct mapper component that converts individual firstName and lastName strings into a FullName domain object.

methods.description: Maps separate firstName and lastName strings into a single FullName object.

notable_aspects: MapStruct-generated mapper configured with componentModel=spring for Spring dependency injection
